title: rubus guentheri var. lamyi
intro: Rubus guentheri var. lamyi, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a variety of bramble native to the Himalayan region. It is a type of plant used in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Rubus guentheri var. lamyi have been linked to various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and fruits can also be used in herbal remedies and supplements.
